# <type>(<scope>): <short description>
#
# Types:   feat    - New feature
#          fix     - Bug fix
#          docs    - Documentation changes
#          test    - Adding or updating tests
#          refactor - Code refactoring (no feature/fix change)
#          chore   - Maintenance tasks (deps, tooling)
#          ci      - CI/CD changes
#          build   - Build system changes
#          perf    - Performance improvements
#          release - Release/version changes
#
# Scope:   (optional) module or area affected
#          e.g., feat(mcp), fix(bundle), docs(readme)
#
# Body:    Explain WHAT and WHY (not how)
#          Wrap at 72 characters
#
# Footer:  BREAKING CHANGE: <description>
#          or Closes #<issue>
#
# Examples:
#   feat(mcp): add sandboxPath helper for path traversal protection
#
#   fix(bundle): verify hash before accepting download
#   - Previously allowed corrupted bundles to pass silently
#   - Now fails fast with clear error message
#
#   docs: add architecture diagram to README
#
#   Closes #123
---
